name: Arancia Genovese
recipeIngredient: 1 pint Italian ice, any flavor or spumoni ice cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut off the top and bottom of each orange to a thickness of 1/4 inch. Set aside.
2. Using a paring knife, separate the rind from the pulp by inserting the knife between the rind and pulp and cutting with a rotating motion. When properly separated, the pulp should easily slip out by pressing with fingers, leaving the hollowed orange rind intact. Discard the pulp.
3. Through the top opening of the rind, place the bottom rind disc so that the rind will hold filling.
4. Fill each rind with Italian ice or spumoni.
5. Using any kitchen utensil, make a hole in the center of the ice or spumoni about the width of a finger.
6. Fill the hole with Galliano.
7. Top with 1 to 2 inches of whipped cream.
8. Make a similar hole in the whipped cream and fill with Creme de cacao.
9. Cap each rind with the reserved top pieces.
10. Serve immediately.
